TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: sm'atu sm' atu hya ga maki squ ryax tngugan abaw. tehuk qu giqas kawas lga lama smrzyut ghap pinbahuw la. msli qu qutux bnkis, mblaq msbalay pqoyat tubux nha ghap. smxu heqil rngil nha pazih, imi nya ga teta buwazyun balay qu pinbahuw. pqsya' an nha qwaw trakis qu atu na qmayah ki qeqaya ptzyuwaw. imi nya ga teta maki l'uy kayal musa 'rkyas pinbahuw.
S.PHON: s~ɕmʔatu s~ɕmʔ atu ħja ɣa maki s~ɕqu rjax tŋuɣan aβaw. teħuk qu ɣiqas~ɕ kawas~ɕ lɣa lama s~ɕmrzjut ɣħap pinβaħuw la. ms~ɕli qu qutux βnkis~ɕ, mβlaq ms~ɕβalaj pqojat tuβux nħa ɣħap. s~ɕmxu ħeqil rŋil nħa paziħ, imi nja ɣa teta βuwazjun βalaj qu pinβaħuw. pqs~ɕjaʔ an nħa qwaw trakis~ɕ qu atu na qmajaħ ki qeqaja ptzjuwaw. imi nja ɣa teta maki lʔuj kajal mus~ɕa ʔrkjas~ɕ pinβaħuw.
S.FORM: sm'atu sm' atu hya ga maki squ ryax tngugan abaw. tehuk qu giqas kawas lga lama smrzyut ghap pinbahuw la. msli qu qutux bnkis, mblaq msbalay pqoyat tubux nha ghap. smxu heqil rngil nha pazih, imi nya ga teta buwazyun balay qu pinbahuw. pqsya' an nha qwaw trakis qu atu na qmayah ki qeqaya ptzyuwaw. imi nya ga teta maki l'uy kayal musa 'rkyas pinbahuw.
S.PHON: s~ɕmʔatu s~ɕmʔ atu ħja ɣa maki s~ɕqu rjax tŋuɣan aβaw. teħuk qu ɣiqas~ɕ kawas~ɕ lɣa lama s~ɕmrzjut ɣħap pinβaħuw la. ms~ɕli qu qutux βnkis~ɕ, mβlaq ms~ɕβalaj pqojat tuβux nħa ɣħap. s~ɕmxu ħeqil rŋil nħa paziħ, imi nja ɣa teta βuwazjun βalaj qu pinβaħuw. pqs~ɕjaʔ an nħa qwaw trakis~ɕ qu atu na qmajaħ ki qeqaja ptzjuwaw. imi nja ɣa teta maki lʔuj kajal mus~ɕa ʔrkjas~ɕ pinβaħuw.
